name: Buttermilk Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, brown sugar, granulated sugar, cinnamon, salt, and ginger until combined.
4. Stir in the vegetable oil until the mixture is crumbly and evenly moistened.
5. For the cake topping, put 3/4 cup of the flour mixture into a small bowl. Stir in the chopped walnuts or pecans and remaining cinnamon.
6. Stir baking powder and baking soda into the remaining mixture.
7. Beat the buttermilk and egg until blended. Add to the flour mixture, stirring until just formed.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle the topping evenly over it.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack. Makes 12 servings.
Per Serving: 398 Calories, 4g Protein, 51g Carbo, 21g Fat, 19mg Chol, 228mg Sodium. Each serving is 47.8% of calories from fat.
